TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Pi’arawan_to_sorit_Mi’edaw, title = Pi’arawan_to_sorit_Mi’edaw, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pi’arawan_to_sorit_Mi’edaw} }

S.FORM: Pi'arawan to sorit: Mi'edaw Ano mangalay ko cima a tamdaw mafana' to ca'of no kawas toya kafokilan nira a demak i, mi'edaw. O 'awol ko sapi'edaw. I tiraay i Falangaw a Pangcah, ano malitemoh nangra ko lafades no 'orip i, caay ka eca mi'edaw, nika o samato'asay no loma' ko midemakay. O likakawa tonini a demak i, ala han ningra ko tosaay laya' no kamay ko karaya' a 'awol, itira cipongoay i, o pisipasipan to remes no kolong. Ano mi'edaw i, telien ko po'ot i terong no ya 'awol, ta pasayra i awaayay ko pongo a misakohepic, ta telien haca ko kilang i tatihi noya 'awol, itiya sato, ripa' han to wa'ay koya kilang, ta tengteng han to kamay koya 'awaol, nanikawanan tayra i kawili, nanikawili tayra i kawanan, satiyotiyolen a mitengteng ta malefot koya 'awaol. Ano o adadaay a tamdaw ko 'edawen i, patalafaleden ko ya kalefotan, i kawananay i, o sakitamdaw; i kawiliay i, o sakikawas. Ano mafedfed koya kawiliay i, o pahapinang to nipiliyas no kawas to tamdaw, o tata'akay ko adada noya tamdaw; ano mafelih, i kawananay ko mafedfeday i, o pahapinang o tamdaw ko miliyasay to kawas, o mamapatay koya tamdaw. Ano macacayat ko kawas ato tamdaw i, o pahapinang caay piliyas ko kawas toya tamdaw, o mamaadah koya tmadaw. Orasaka, o pi'edaw haw i, o nikangalay no tamdaw to ca'of no kawas to samaanen ko piso'ayaw ano pakalitemoh to masamaamaanay a demak. Ano nga'ayay ko 'edaw i, o sakanga'ay no faloco' a midemak; ano tatiihay ko 'edaw i, o sakafana' a miliyas. Pi'arawan to lakaw 石磊,1976, .
S.PHON: piʡarawan to~u so~urit: miʡəɬ~ɮaw ano~u maŋaɾaj ko~u ʦima a tamɬ~ɮaw mafanaʡ to~u ʦaʡo~uf no~u kawas to~uja kafo~ukiɾan nira a ɬ~ɮəmak i, miʡəɬ~ɮaw. o~u ʡawo~uɾ ko~u sapiʡəɬ~ɮaw. i tiraaj i faɾaŋaw a paŋʦaħ, ano~u maɾitəmo~uħ naŋra ko~u ɾafaɬ~ɮəs no~u ʡo~urip i, ʦaaj ka əʦa miʡəɬ~ɮaw, nika o~u samato~uʡasaj no~u ɾo~umaʡ ko~u miɬ~ɮəmakaj. o~u ɾikakawa to~unini a ɬ~ɮəmak i, aɾa ħan niŋra ko~u to~usaaj ɾajaʡ no~u kamaj ko~u karajaʡ a ʡawo~uɾ, itira ʦipo~uŋo~uaj i, o~u pisipasipan to~u rəməs no~u ko~uɾo~uŋ. ano~u miʡəɬ~ɮaw i, təɾiən ko~u po~uʡo~ut i təro~uŋ no~u ja ʡawo~uɾ, ta pasajra i awaajaj ko~u po~uŋo~u a misako~uħəpiʦ, ta təɾiən ħaʦa ko~u kiɾaŋ i tatiħi no~uja ʡawo~uɾ, itija sato~u, ripaʡ ħan to~u waʡaj ko~uja kiɾaŋ, ta təŋtəŋ ħan to~u kamaj ko~uja ʡawao~uɾ, nanikawanan tajra i kawiɾi, nanikawiɾi tajra i kawanan, satijo~utijo~uɾən a mitəŋtəŋ ta maɾəfo~ut ko~uja ʡawao~uɾ. ano~u o~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj a tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u ʡəɬ~ɮawən i, pataɾafaɾəɬ~ɮən ko~u ja kaɾəfo~utan, i kawananaj i, o~u sakitamɬ~ɮaw; i kawiɾiaj i, o~u sakikawas. ano~u mafəɬ~ɮfəɬ~ɮ ko~uja kawiɾiaj i, o~u paħapinaŋ to~u nipiɾijas no~u kawas to~u tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u tataʡakaj ko~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa no~uja tamɬ~ɮaw; ano~u mafəɾiħ, i kawananaj ko~u mafəɬ~ɮfəɬ~ɮaj i, o~u paħapinaŋ o~u tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u miɾijasaj to~u kawas, o~u mamapataj ko~uja tamɬ~ɮaw. ano~u maʦaʦajat ko~u kawas ato~u tamɬ~ɮaw i, o~u paħapinaŋ ʦaaj piɾijas ko~u kawas to~uja tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u mamaaɬ~ɮaħ ko~uja tmaɬ~ɮaw. o~urasaka, o~u piʡəɬ~ɮaw ħaw i, o~u nikaŋaɾaj no~u tamɬ~ɮaw to~u ʦaʡo~uf no~u kawas to~u samaanən ko~u piso~uʡajaw ano~u pakaɾitəmo~uħ to~u masamaamaanaj a ɬ~ɮəmak. ano~u ŋaʡajaj ko~u ʡəɬ~ɮaw i, o~u sakaŋaʡaj no~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ a miɬ~ɮəmak; ano~u tatiiħaj ko~u ʡəɬ~ɮaw i, o~u sakafanaʡ a miɾijas. piʡarawan to~u ɾakaw **,****, .
S.FORM: Pi'arawan to sorit: Mi'edaw Ano mangalay ko cima a tamdaw mafana' to ca'of no kawas toya kafokilan nira a demak i, mi'edaw. O 'awol ko sapi'edaw. I tiraay i Falangaw a Pangcah, ano malitemoh nangra ko lafades no 'orip i, caay ka eca mi'edaw, nika o samato'asay no loma' ko midemakay. O likakawa tonini a demak i, ala han ningra ko tosaay laya' no kamay ko karaya' a 'awol, itira cipongoay i, o pisipasipan to remes no kolong. Ano mi'edaw i, telien ko po'ot i terong no ya 'awol, ta pasayra i awaayay ko pongo a misakohepic, ta telien haca ko kilang i tatihi noya 'awol, itiya sato, ripa' han to wa'ay koya kilang, ta tengteng han to kamay koya 'awaol, nanikawanan tayra i kawili, nanikawili tayra i kawanan, satiyotiyolen a mitengteng ta malefot koya 'awaol. Ano o adadaay a tamdaw ko 'edawen i, patalafaleden ko ya kalefotan, i kawananay i, o sakitamdaw; i kawiliay i, o sakikawas. Ano mafedfed koya kawiliay i, o pahapinang to nipiliyas no kawas to tamdaw, o tata'akay ko adada noya tamdaw; ano mafelih, i kawananay ko mafedfeday i, o pahapinang o tamdaw ko miliyasay to kawas, o mamapatay koya tamdaw. Ano macacayat ko kawas ato tamdaw i, o pahapinang caay piliyas ko kawas toya tamdaw, o mamaadah koya tmadaw. Orasaka, o pi'edaw haw i, o nikangalay no tamdaw to ca'of no kawas to samaanen ko piso'ayaw ano pakalitemoh to masamaamaanay a demak. Ano nga'ayay ko 'edaw i, o sakanga'ay no faloco' a midemak; ano tatiihay ko 'edaw i, o sakafana' a miliyas. Pi'arawan to lakaw 石磊,1976, .
S.PHON: piʡarawan to~u so~urit: miʡəɬ~ɮaw ano~u maŋaɾaj ko~u ʦima a tamɬ~ɮaw mafanaʡ to~u ʦaʡo~uf no~u kawas to~uja kafo~ukiɾan nira a ɬ~ɮəmak i, miʡəɬ~ɮaw. o~u ʡawo~uɾ ko~u sapiʡəɬ~ɮaw. i tiraaj i faɾaŋaw a paŋʦaħ, ano~u maɾitəmo~uħ naŋra ko~u ɾafaɬ~ɮəs no~u ʡo~urip i, ʦaaj ka əʦa miʡəɬ~ɮaw, nika o~u samato~uʡasaj no~u ɾo~umaʡ ko~u miɬ~ɮəmakaj. o~u ɾikakawa to~unini a ɬ~ɮəmak i, aɾa ħan niŋra ko~u to~usaaj ɾajaʡ no~u kamaj ko~u karajaʡ a ʡawo~uɾ, itira ʦipo~uŋo~uaj i, o~u pisipasipan to~u rəməs no~u ko~uɾo~uŋ. ano~u miʡəɬ~ɮaw i, təɾiən ko~u po~uʡo~ut i təro~uŋ no~u ja ʡawo~uɾ, ta pasajra i awaajaj ko~u po~uŋo~u a misako~uħəpiʦ, ta təɾiən ħaʦa ko~u kiɾaŋ i tatiħi no~uja ʡawo~uɾ, itija sato~u, ripaʡ ħan to~u waʡaj ko~uja kiɾaŋ, ta təŋtəŋ ħan to~u kamaj ko~uja ʡawao~uɾ, nanikawanan tajra i kawiɾi, nanikawiɾi tajra i kawanan, satijo~utijo~uɾən a mitəŋtəŋ ta maɾəfo~ut ko~uja ʡawao~uɾ. ano~u o~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj a tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u ʡəɬ~ɮawən i, pataɾafaɾəɬ~ɮən ko~u ja kaɾəfo~utan, i kawananaj i, o~u sakitamɬ~ɮaw; i kawiɾiaj i, o~u sakikawas. ano~u mafəɬ~ɮfəɬ~ɮ ko~uja kawiɾiaj i, o~u paħapinaŋ to~u nipiɾijas no~u kawas to~u tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u tataʡakaj ko~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa no~uja tamɬ~ɮaw; ano~u mafəɾiħ, i kawananaj ko~u mafəɬ~ɮfəɬ~ɮaj i, o~u paħapinaŋ o~u tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u miɾijasaj to~u kawas, o~u mamapataj ko~uja tamɬ~ɮaw. ano~u maʦaʦajat ko~u kawas ato~u tamɬ~ɮaw i, o~u paħapinaŋ ʦaaj piɾijas ko~u kawas to~uja tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u mamaaɬ~ɮaħ ko~uja tmaɬ~ɮaw. o~urasaka, o~u piʡəɬ~ɮaw ħaw i, o~u nikaŋaɾaj no~u tamɬ~ɮaw to~u ʦaʡo~uf no~u kawas to~u samaanən ko~u piso~uʡajaw ano~u pakaɾitəmo~uħ to~u masamaamaanaj a ɬ~ɮəmak. ano~u ŋaʡajaj ko~u ʡəɬ~ɮaw i, o~u sakaŋaʡaj no~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ a miɬ~ɮəmak; ano~u tatiiħaj ko~u ʡəɬ~ɮaw i, o~u sakafanaʡ a miɾijas. piʡarawan to~u ɾakaw **,****, .
